examples: We must never be unworthy of our teachers' untiring and sincere teachings.
He is a man of untiring industry.
Untiring ability to work and cover rough terrain for long periods of time.
His good looks, untiring, bubbly personality and talents have already made him a star in his home country.
Particularly during his sixteen years in the United States Senate, Senator Wallop has been an untiring and steadfast Keeper of the Flame.
